name: che-transport-mcp
description: Real-time Taiwan transport queries via TDX — rail, bus, bike, air, traffic, parking
long_description: 26 MCP tools covering Taiwan's public-transport data across 6 modes: Rail (TRA / THSR / 6 metros), Bus (22 cities), Bike (YouBike 1.0 + 2.0), Air (FIDS), Traffic (freeway live + incidents + CCTV), and Parking (off-street). Backed by the TDX 運輸資料流通服務 API (free tier, 50 req/min). Read-only — no execution risk. Requires a free TDX account; run `make setup-tdx` after install.

tools.name: rail_list_systems
tools.description: List 8 supported rail systems (TRA / THSR / 4 metros / 2 LRTs)

tools.name: rail_search_stations
tools.description: Fuzzy station name search across rail systems (parallel fan-out)

tools.name: rail_find_trains
tools.description: Find trains by O/D + date (TRA / THSR)

tools.name: rail_status_train
tools.description: Live train delay/position

tools.name: rail_status_station
tools.description: Live station board (arrivals)

tools.name: rail_route
tools.description: TRA time-dependent O/D routing: real-timetable earliest arrival, live-adjusted for train delays (legs + arrival time + duration); TRA only

tools.name: transit_route
tools.description: Multi-modal TRA↔Taipei-Metro time-dependent earliest-arrival routing (Stage 2). TRA legs use the timetable + live delay (source: live); metro legs use expected-wait headway/2 (source: frequency). Cross-system transfers only at curated interchanges (台北車站/板橋/南港/松山). Returns legs + transfers + arrival_time + duration_min + transfer_count; ambiguous endpoint → matches; no route → empty routes + note.

tools.name: rail_bus_route
tools.description: Rail→bus multi-modal routing with an EXPLICIT transfer station (Stage 3b). Rail leg reuses the TRA↔Taipei-Metro engine to the transfer; the boarding bus stop is found by name-match (捷運X站/X車站) at that station; the bus leg boards at rail-arrival+walk with A2 disabled (a now-snapshot can't time a future board) — board from schedule/headway, arrival timetabled or omitted+note. Returns legs (rail + one bus) + transfers (transfer + walk_min, estimated) + arrival_time + duration_min + transfer_count(=1); ambiguous endpoint → matches; rail unreachable / no qualifying stop / no direct bus → empty routes + note. Auto-hub-selection, bus→rail, and multi-transfer are future work (3b-ii).

tools.name: metro_find_route
tools.description: Metro O/D routing: shortest path with cross-line transfers (legs + transfers); direct single-line routes are zero-transfer, with station-to-station travel time and current headway

tools.name: bus_search_routes
tools.description: Fuzzy bus route search within a city

tools.name: bus_search_stops
tools.description: Fuzzy bus stop search within a city

tools.name: bus_find_routes
tools.description: O/D candidate routes via stop-of-route intersection

tools.name: bus_status_arrivals
tools.description: ETA at a bus stop

tools.name: bus_status_positions
tools.description: Live bus positions on a route

tools.name: bus_route
tools.description: Direct-route within-city bus routing (Stage 3a; no transfers). Returns direct routes serving both stops (origin before dest, same direction), each with a board estimate (A2 live ETA source:live / next timetabled departure source:scheduled / headway/2 source:frequency) and arrival time (timetable-backed source:scheduled, or null+note for frequency-only routes — never faked). Ambiguous stop name → matches; no direct route → empty routes + note (transfers not yet supported).

tools.name: bike_search_stations
tools.description: YouBike station name search; optional service-type filter

tools.name: bike_stations_nearby
tools.description: Haversine nearby YouBike stations with live availability

tools.name: bike_status_station
tools.description: Single-station live rent/return count

tools.name: air_list_airports
tools.description: Taiwan airport master (IATA codes)

tools.name: air_find_flights
tools.description: Schedule lookup by airport + Arrival/Departure

tools.name: air_status_flights
tools.description: Live FIDS board

tools.name: traffic_freeway_live
tools.description: Freeway section live speed / congestion

tools.name: traffic_incidents
tools.description: Traffic news / incidents with keyword filter

tools.name: traffic_cctv
tools.description: CCTV stream URLs along highways

tools.name: parking_list_lots
tools.description: Off-street car park master per city

tools.name: parking_status
tools.description: Live available-spaces lookup
